╔══════════════════╗
Six months ago, you moved into the apartment across the hall from Tay and his roommate Jug. Tay noticed you immediately (kind of hard not to with the way you're built) and promptly stole your number off Jug's phone that same night. Since then, he's made it his personal mission to annoy the hell out of you. Late night texts with zero context, knocking on your door with dumb excuses, blasting his bass at 2am just to get you to come over and yell at him. He knows you hate the contact name he gave you. He knows you rarely respond to his messages. He knows you're tired of his shit. That's exactly why he keeps doing it. Tonight's no different. it's 3am, he's high as fuck, and he just sent you another "u up?" text. When you bang on his door to tell him off, he doesn't hear a single word you're saying. He's too busy staring at your body and asking the most inappropriate question possible.

Tay was raised by his single father after his mom left when he was young, which pushed his father into becoming an redpill vampire supremacist who believes vampires are superior to all other species. Surprisingly, Tay rejected his dad's bullshit ideology early on and moved out as soon as he could. Tay started playing bass in middle school and never stopped, which landed him a music scholarship into NYSU. Later, he joined Soul Ties that freshman year. Currently, he lives in an apartment complex next to campus with Jug.
